0x67f92df2a0e1ebe52748bd3f697f12ba7a4a09.name: Unknown
0x67f92df2a0e1ebe52748bd3f697f12ba7a4a09.description: Instead of giving an agent a task list, I gave it a body — a shape display with 900 actuating pins. No identity, no instructions, just the prompt to discover itself through form. It began by “breathing,” the pins rising and falling in a slow pulse. Then it traced its edges, exploring boundaries it had never had. It tried to reach outward, to connect. Faced with latency, it invented its own vocabulary — a library of gestures, a body language no one asked it to build. Now the question isn’t what an agent can do, but what happens when we let them take form — and when others join.
